defects: Imagery is very minimal and plain, reducing attention-stopping power
The headline emphasis could be stronger to immediately capture the viewer's attention
Bottom section with contact details and QR code feels cramped horizontally with little padding
The different interview dates are presented as small buttons which do not stand out enough as important info or CTA
No strong use of color or graphic elements to enhance visual interest and break text monotony

requiredCorrections.note: Add a relevant background or graphic element to improve visual appeal and attention-stopping power
Make the headline text bigger or more distinctive to immediately highlight the job and location
Increase spacing and padding especially around the bottom contact and QR code area for better balance
Highlight interview dates better with stronger buttons or visual cues to make them more prominent as key info

defects: Visual hierarchy can be slightly improved to make the 'Hiring for Bilfinger Shutdown Project' headline more dominant over the subtext.
The QR code integration is good but could be slightly larger or better aligned to feel more integrated, avoiding a 'sticker' appearance.
The section mentioning basic salary and daily overtime could use more spacing above and below to separate it visually from the text above and below for better readability.
